title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Cleartrip Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Cleartrip Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Cleartrip Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cleartrip Hotels:
Cleartrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
